title: Dragon Block Legends
description: Unleash your inner warrior with high-powered energy battles, transformations, and epic rivalries.
body:
# Dragon Block Legends
**Dragon Block Legends** is a Minecraft mod focused on energy-based combat, character progression, and powerful transformations inspired by anime-style battles. Start as a normal player and grow stronger by training your stats, including strength, speed, and endurance. Progression is handled through a power leveling system that rewards combat and training, allowing you to gradually increase your power over time. # **Features** **Stat Training System** – Improve attributes like strength, defense, and energy through combat and training methods. **Energy (Ki) System** – Charge and use energy for abilities such as blasts, flight, and movement techniques. **Transformations** – Unlock forms that increase your stats and abilities, each with different strengths and energy costs. **Combat Abilities** – Use ranged energy attacks and mobility skills like flight and teleportation. **Gravity Training** – Train under increased gravity to boost your progression faster. **Boss Battles** – Fight strong enemies designed to test your build and progression. ### What makes this mod unique? Dragon Block Legends focuses on progression and player choice, allowing you to decide how to train and fight. Transformations and abilities are balanced with energy management, meaning strategy matters—not just raw power. ![goku in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/238985d7b7ab5f8c701b98b58ea75f6045830bdd_0.webp)
